confidence_justification_reported: The synthesis is built upon highly reliable, recent statistical data from Eurostat and ISTAT, cross-referenced with peer-reviewed macroeconomic analyses regarding the intersection of UBI theory and Italian structural economic realities.
key_data_limitations_reported: Long-term microsimulation models for UBI rely on static behavioral assumptions that may not fully capture dynamic labor supply responses over multiple generations.
Estimates of the shadow economy and informal labor are inherently imprecise and subject to retrospective statistical revisions.
Projected demographic and fiscal trajectories depend heavily on volatile international geopolitical developments and ECB monetary policy adjustments.
